summary.summary: Updates the MedtrumKit submodule to a new commit (submodule updated from commit 3ad0979a3c8fc36c2d48a76da8ea70ef2132943a to 9914b18c05e9d1064756eaf76a975ea02790e199) (diff:6f7da4d5f00c; file:51ece0dd8c80). The upstream changelog included with this update lists: feat: Add Manual Temp Basal; fix: add backup flow for error code 7; fix: prevent double callback hit; fix: sync collision (pr:gordolio/Trio#1313; pr:nightscout/Trio#1313). The repository commit message for this change is "chore: update MedtrumKit" (commit:cfd1b04ad740) and the change was merged (commit:a934620c0987).
summary.userFacingImpact: The update brings an upstream feature (Manual Temp Basal) and several bug fixes in MedtrumKit as listed in the included changelog (pr:gordolio/Trio#1313; pr:nightscout/Trio#1313). The direct effect on Trio's runtime behavior or user-visible UI/flows is not shown in the supplied Trio change artifacts (diff:6f7da4d5f00c; file:51ece0dd8c80); a human review is required to verify how these upstream changes manifest to end users within Trio (commit:cfd1b04ad740).
